raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is clear of surrounding obstacles on its lateral sides and within the reach envelope of the right arm.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely held by the right end-effector and no longer rests on the table, freeing space in front of box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table area front-right, clear of objects",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the chosen front-right region of the table is free of objects and large enough (≥5×5 cm).",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is placed upright in the designated front-right area, safely out of the manipulation corridor for the boxes. The right hand is released."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "Box_2’s front face is accessible (cup already removed) and there is free space to the right side of box_2 so it can slide without colliding with other objects or falling off the table.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is shifted ~20 cm to the right, breaking its contact with box_1 and creating lateral clearance for grasping box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1’s left and right sides are clear (box_2 moved away) and there is sufficient vertical clearance for both grippers to approach from opposite lateral sides.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely held between the two end-effectors, lifted slightly above the table surface and ready for transport or further manipulation as required by downstream tasks."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is clear of surrounding obstacles on its lateral sides and within the reach envelope of the right arm.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely held by the right end-effector and no longer rests on the table, freeing space in front of box_2.

parsed_json.Target: table area front-right, clear of objects
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the chosen front-right region of the table is free of objects and large enough (≥5×5 cm).
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is placed upright in the designated front-right area, safely out of the manipulation corridor for the boxes. The right hand is released.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2’s front face is accessible (cup already removed) and there is free space to the right side of box_2 so it can slide without colliding with other objects or falling off the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is shifted ~20 cm to the right, breaking its contact with box_1 and creating lateral clearance for grasping box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1’s left and right sides are clear (box_2 moved away) and there is sufficient vertical clearance for both grippers to approach from opposite lateral sides.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely held between the two end-effectors, lifted slightly above the table surface and ready for transport or further manipulation as required by downstream tasks.
